461 N4M N4M_NONE_ABOVE (N4M) None of Above Activity Preferences CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
462 N5A N5A_CHG_TYPE_ACT (N5A) Type of Activities Currently Involved In CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: prefers change in daily routine - type of activities involved in. 0 = No Change, 1 = Slight Change, 2 = Major Change, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
